title: rubus howii
intro: Rubus howii, also known as Taiwanese raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Taiwan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus howii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable plant for maintaining overall health and well-being. Rubus howii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
